hero.description: And this is my small portfolio website. Here you can find some information about me and get to know about my projects. Thank you for visiting!

about.title: About
bioText: I am a frontend developer who believes an interface is not enough on its own; a product should be clear, intuitive, and genuinely useful for people.

In my work, I focus not only on visual design but also on interaction logic, performance, and application structure. I aim to write clean, maintainable code and build architecture that keeps projects easy to extend.

I enjoy thinking through user experience, finding effective solutions, and turning ideas into working interfaces. I continuously explore new approaches and tools to deliver better, more thoughtful products.

social.title: Contacts
social.description: Pick the most convenient channel. Telegram is best for a quick chat, GitHub shows my work, email is best for detailed requests.
social.note: Open to freelance work, product teams and interesting collaborations.
